summary: Data Scientist and AI Solutions Builder with 2+ years building Generative AI apps, RAG knowledge systems, LLM chatbots, backend AI services, cloud ETL pipelines, BI dashboards, ML models and workflow automation.

stats.l: Less reporting data movement via CDC

focus.label: RAG systems
focus.detail: Document ingestion, chunking, embeddings, vector retrieval, prompt templates and grounded Q&A.

focus.label: AI services
focus.detail: FastAPI and NestJS services for chatbots, ticket summarisation, file workflows and search.

focus.label: Data platforms
focus.detail: AWS Glue, S3, Redshift Serverless, RDS, SQL validation layers and Power BI reporting.

experience.title: Data Scientist / AI Solutions Builder
responsibilities: Built enterprise GenAI and LLM solutions using Azure OpenAI, OpenAI/Gemini APIs, LangChain, FAISS and Python for RAG, knowledge search and chatbot workflows.
Designed RAG knowledge base systems with ingestion, chunking, embeddings, vector retrieval, prompt templates and conversational response generation.
Developed FastAPI and NestJS backend AI services for chatbots, intelligent search, file processing, ticket summarisation, OTP flows and API automation.
Created Gemini-powered ticket summarisation workflows that reduced manual review effort by about 40% and improved triage speed.
Built AWS analytics pipelines from MySQL RDS to AWS Glue, S3, Redshift Serverless and Power BI with watermark-based incremental loading, cutting downstream reporting data volume by about 99%.
Designed SQL/Python migration workflows with raw, staging, validation and target layers, legacy ID preservation, reconciliation and rollback planning.
Delivered Power BI and Tableau dashboards for billing, meter usage, call-center analytics and operational KPI reporting.
Automated data preparation and reporting with Python, SQL and Alteryx Designer, reducing recurring processing effort by about 30%.

experience.title: Data Analyst Intern
responsibilities: Cleaned, transformed and analysed call-center and operational datasets using Python, SQL, Alteryx and BI workflows.
Built Power BI dashboards to track call performance, customer satisfaction signals, service trends and operational KPIs.
Explored transcript analytics with OpenAI Whisper and NLP to convert unstructured call data into measurable insights.

projects.title: Enterprise RAG Knowledge Systems
projects.description: Production-oriented RAG systems with document ingestion, chunking, embeddings, FAISS/vector retrieval, prompt templates and context-aware Q&A for internal knowledge access.

projects.title: AWS Incremental Analytics Pipeline
projects.description: MySQL RDS to AWS Glue, S3, Redshift Serverless and Power BI pipeline with transformation layers and watermark-based incremental loading, reducing reporting data movement by about 99%.

projects.title: AI Ticket Summarisation Service
projects.description: Gemini-powered support workflow that turns structured ticket data into concise, keyword-tagged summaries, cutting manual review effort by roughly 40%.

projects.title: Legacy Data Migration Framework
projects.description: Raw-to-staging-to-validation-to-target migration framework with preserved legacy IDs, mapping tables, dependency checks, reconciliation and sign-off controls.

projects.title: Customer Churn Prediction App
projects.description: End-to-end churn prediction app with feature engineering, XGBoost model evaluation, FastAPI serving and a lightweight React frontend; achieved 84.6% ROC AUC.

projects.title: Pipe Failure Prediction
projects.description: Predictive analytics prototypes using asset, usage and operational features to support risk ranking, anomaly detection and maintenance prioritisation.

projects.title: MCP Demo Server
projects.description: FastMCP demo server with simulated Jira, GitHub and CloudWatch-style data to demonstrate tool-based AI querying and agentic workflow patterns.

projects.title: Computer Vision Research
projects.description: Presented CIDA-23 research on side-face image generation for vulnerability analysis of face-recognition algorithms and robustness dataset creation.

certifications.name: Presented CIDA-23 Research: Side Face Image Generation for Vulnerability Analysis of Face Recognition Algorithms
Fundamental AI Concepts / Azure AI Learning
